eventhub_name.description: The name of the Event Hub for which the authorization rule is being created.

listen.description: A boolean flag to specify if the authorization rule should have listen permissions. Defaults to 'false' if not specified.

manage.description: A boolean flag to specify if the authorization rule should have manage permissions, which includes listen and send permissions. Defaults to 'false' if not specified.

name.description: The name of the authorization rule to be created.

namespace_name.description: The name of the Event Hub Namespace within which the Event Hub and authorization rule reside.

send.description: A boolean flag to specify if the authorization rule should have send permissions. Defaults to 'false' if not specified.

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.
